Like all ACA stations, everything is fine, clean bathrooms, etc.

reviews.comment:
Todo bien, variedad y algunas cosas sin tacc en heladera, muy bien! Podés almorzar, variedad de sandwiches y ensaladas , lugar tranka. Al costao alguna que otra mesita de material y una pequeña plaza con juegos ...

Todo al ladito de una mazorca...me daba zogaca de que salgan pibitos de entre el maizal🙄😲

(Translated by Google)
Everything was great, a good variety and some gluten-free options in the fridge, very nice! You can have lunch there, a variety of sandwiches and salads, a chill place. Next door there are a few small tables and a little playground...

All right next to an ear of corn... I was worried kids might jump out of the cornfield 🙄😲
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6605327411822953876/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNjd2FtWUhnEAE

reviews.comment:

reviews.comment:
Muy bueno, estacionamiento, arboleda. Mesas exterior, baños limpios. Recomendable.

Very good, parking, trees. Outdoor tables, clean restrooms. Highly recommended.

reviews.comment:
